# levnikolaevich claude-code-skills

**Source:** https://github.com/levnikolaevich/claude-code-skills  
**Imported:** 2026-05-30  
**Why:** hex-line (hash-verified editing) and hex-graph (knowledge graph) patterns.

## Key patterns adopted

- **hex-line:** Hash-verified editing — ensures edits are applied to the exact expected content (prevents accidental edits to wrong file version)
- **hex-graph:** Knowledge graph of codebase — similar to codegraph but lighter weight

## Skills imported

| Skill | Purpose |
|---|---|
| `hex-line-edit` | Hash-verified file editing — checks file hash before editing |
